query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.equipeId,
  e.nome as equipe_nome
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
WHERE u.equipeId IN (
  SELECT id FROM equipes WHERE gestorId = (
    SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com'
  )
)
AND u.role = 'corretor';
